title: Galactic curation handoff
body: Owner ended the session and requested oak-session-handoff. Batch 11 is closed: 5 legacy backlog entries dispositioned in place (3 duplicate, 2 owner-gated) and strict-hard was SOFT with hard 0 / critical 0. Batch 12 claim 923d0e3b is closed as unlanded: it was opened after evidence gathering, but the attempted patch failed and no batch 12 dispositions landed. Next session should resume from the next five legacy backlog entries: reviewer doctrine-carrier, reviewer recipe forcing-function, validation-strategy topology, git index-lock interaction, and session-close housekeeping. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
